zh.Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵

zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Comyn於1180年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵時，他的父親William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan17歲，母親Sarah FitzHugh14歲。他和Isabella Countess of Menteith至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1258年12月在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Comyn was born in 1180, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, was 17 and his mother, Sarah FitzHugh, was 14. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Isabella Countess of Menteith. He died in December 1258, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Comyn est né en 1180, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Sarah FitzHugh, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Isabella Countess of Menteith. Il est décédé en décembre 1258, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Comyn 1180 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan 17 und seine Mutter Sarah FitzHugh 14. Er hatte mit Isabella Countess of Menteith mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Dezember 1258 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Comyn è nato il nel 1180 nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Sarah FitzHugh, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Isabella Countess of Menteith. Morì nel dicembre 1258, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Comynが1180年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで生まれた時，父William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchanは17歳，母Sarah FitzHughは14歳であった。彼はIsabella Countess of Menteithとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1258年12月にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Comyn(이)가 1180년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah FitzHugh(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Isabella Countess of Menteith(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1258년 12월 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Comyn родился в 1180 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah FitzHugh, 14. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Isabella Countess of Menteith. Он умер декабрь 1258 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.
